changes.text: Added a feedback form to report bugs, request features, and to suggest improvements. The CSGrowers Team is notified when feedback is submitted.
Added clearer phrasing for ET summary box.
Fixed visual bug where ETc would not update upon the changing of crop coefficient.
New and improved irrigation data upload interface. Added dynamic menus to select target date and irrigation columns and added unit detection.
Put data visualizations on top of data tables and tweaked certain graphs for greater clarity.
Switched precipitation data source from OpenET to California Department of Water Resources.
Added default Crop Coefficient for each month on the year (almonds only at the moment).
Rolling start date and end date windows. Data tables show most recent data on top.
Fixed statistical and coding errors in RZD, TAW, and RAW calculations.
Implemented back-end fix to prevent latency in data, specifically in regards to Water Potential.
Added Changelog (what you're reading right now)!
Added Precipitation measurements to Irrigation tab. Data can still be edited.
Revamped external naming of certain orchards.
Improved logic on who sees what aspects of the app.
Users can input Irrigation, Precipitation, and Pressure Bomb data to the thousandth place.
Tutorial overhaul, users can click through nine pages with pictures, available at the bottom of every page.
Fixed issue where label underneath RZD would sometimes show the wrong label.
